text_list: Under the General Corporation Law of the State of Delaware. Articles Amended February 24, 1969, June 8, 1987, April 13, 1989, and August 10, 1993, in perpetuity. Name changed from Southern Pacific Transportation Company, February 1, 1998.

Q4.text: Union Pacific Container Logistics Company was merged into Union Pacific Railroad Company (UPRR) effective January 9, 2019. SP Enviromental Waste Systems, Inc. was merged into UPRR effective April 10, 2019. MRT Exploration Company, SP Enviromental Systems, Inc., and Southern Pacific Receivable, Inc. were merged into UPRR effective April 17, 2019. Southern Pacific Fleet Acquisition Company was merged into UPRR effective April 18, 2019. UP Transportation Services Canada Corporation was merged into UPRR effective May 8, 2019. Southern Pacific Asset Management Company and UP International Advisors, Inc. were merged into UPRR effective December 9, 2019.
